spec_match.rationale: Walks SASS-to-native nesting conversion with per-step before/after.

edge_cases.rationale: Single migration path. No bidirectional case (e.g. SASS feature that has no native equivalent).

openQuestions.title: Add SASS-only escape hatch examples
openQuestions.detail: Show one or two SASS features (e.g. @mixin, @function) that native nesting doesn't replace, so the guide is honest about what migration covers.
